'''√x-?-n''' ('''xaen''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:hunt|hunt]]".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| x-?-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:hunt|hunt]]
|-
! Citation form
| √x-?-n
|-
! Lemma
| xaen
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thixa?an|thixa?an]] || [[word:jixa?an|jixa?an]] || [[word:shixa?an|shixa?an]] || [[word:kixa?an|kixa?an]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuxa?an|thuthuxa?an]] || [[word:jujuxa?an|jujuxa?an]] || [[word:shushuxa?an|shushuxa?an]] || [[word:kukuxa?an|kukuxa?an]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuxa?an|thuxa?an]] || [[word:juxa?an|juxa?an]] || [[word:shuxa?an|shuxa?an]] || [[word:kuxa?an|kuxa?an]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuxa?an|thuxa?an]] || [[word:juxa?an|juxa?an]] || [[word:shuxa?an|shuxa?an]] || [[word:kuxa?an|kuxa?an]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thexa?an|thexa?an]] || [[word:jexa?an|jexa?an]] || [[word:shexa?an|shexa?an]] || [[word:kexa?an|kexa?an]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothoxa?an|thothoxa?an]] || [[word:jojoxa?an|jojoxa?an]] || [[word:shoshoxa?an|shoshoxa?an]] || [[word:kokoxa?an|kokoxa?an]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thoxa?an|thoxa?an]] || [[word:joxa?an|joxa?an]] || [[word:shoxa?an|shoxa?an]] || [[word:koxa?an|koxa?an]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thoxa?an|thoxa?an]] || [[word:joxa?an|joxa?an]] || [[word:shoxa?an|shoxa?an]] || [[word:koxa?an|koxa?an]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thæxa?an|thæxa?an]] || [[word:jæxa?an|jæxa?an]] || [[word:shæxa?an|shæxa?an]] || [[word:kæxa?an|kæxa?an]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathaxa?an|thathaxa?an]] || [[word:jajaxa?an|jajaxa?an]] || [[word:shashaxa?an|shashaxa?an]] || [[word:kakaxa?an|kakaxa?an]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thaxa?an|thaxa?an]] || [[word:jaxa?an|jaxa?an]] || [[word:shaxa?an|shaxa?an]] || [[word:kaxa?an|kaxa?an]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thaxa?an|thaxa?an]] || [[word:jaxa?an|jaxa?an]] || [[word:shaxa?an|shaxa?an]] || [[word:kaxa?an|kaxa?an]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shaxa?an|shaxa?an]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshaxa?an|goshaxa?an]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishaxa?an|gokishaxa?an]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shaxa?anü|shaxa?anü]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshaxa?anknü|goshaxa?anknü]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishaxa?anü|gokishaxa?anü]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shaxa?anshë|shaxa?anshë]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshaxa?ankshë|goshaxa?ankshë]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishaxa?anshë|gokishaxa?anshë]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shaxa?anro|shaxa?anro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshaxa?ankro|goshaxa?ankro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishaxa?anro|gokishaxa?anro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shaxa?anmu|shaxa?anmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshaxa?ankmu|goshaxa?ankmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishaxa?anmu|gokishaxa?anmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shaxa?ansher|shaxa?ansher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshaxa?anksher|goshaxa?anksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishaxa?ansher|gokishaxa?ansher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shaxa?ang|shaxa?ang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshaxa?ankng|goshaxa?ankng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishaxa?ang|gokishaxa?ang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shaxa?anya|shaxa?anya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshaxa?ankya|goshaxa?ankya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishaxa?anya|gokishaxa?anya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shaxa?anyam|shaxa?anyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshaxa?ankyam|goshaxa?ankyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishaxa?anyam|gokishaxa?anyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shaxa?anüshë|shaxa?anüshë]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshaxa?anknüshë|goshaxa?anknüshë]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishaxa?anüshë|gokishaxa?anüshë]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shaxa?anüro|shaxa?anüro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshaxa?anknüro|goshaxa?anknüro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishaxa?anüro|gokishaxa?anüro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shaxa?anümu|shaxa?anümu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshaxa?anknümu|goshaxa?anknümu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishaxa?anümu|gokishaxa?anümu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shaxa?anshënü|shaxa?anshënü]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshaxa?ankshënü|goshaxa?ankshënü]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishaxa?anshënü|gokishaxa?anshënü]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shaxa?anshëro|shaxa?anshëro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshaxa?ankshëro|goshaxa?ankshëro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishaxa?anshëro|gokishaxa?anshëro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shaxa?anshëmu|shaxa?anshëmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshaxa?ankshëmu|goshaxa?ankshëmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishaxa?anshëmu|gokishaxa?anshëmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shaxa?anronü|shaxa?anronü]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshaxa?ankronü|goshaxa?ankronü]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishaxa?anronü|gokishaxa?anronü]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shaxa?anroshë|shaxa?anroshë]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshaxa?ankroshë|goshaxa?ankroshë]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishaxa?anroshë|gokishaxa?anroshë]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shaxa?anromu|shaxa?anromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshaxa?ankromu|goshaxa?ankromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishaxa?anromu|gokishaxa?anromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shaxa?anmunü|shaxa?anmunü]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshaxa?ankmunü|goshaxa?ankmunü]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishaxa?anmunü|gokishaxa?anmunü]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shaxa?anmushë|shaxa?anmushë]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshaxa?ankmushë|goshaxa?ankmushë]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishaxa?anmushë|gokishaxa?anmushë]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shaxa?anmuro|shaxa?anmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshaxa?ankmuro|goshaxa?ankmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishaxa?anmuro|gokishaxa?anmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|3a936e1}}
